activities.name: Student Government Association
activities.description: Organized school-wide initiatives, including a sustainability week and mental health workshops, leading a team of 10 students.

activities.name: Varsity Soccer Team
activities.description: Led team practices and strategies, improved team's win rate by 20%, and coordinated community soccer clinics for youth.

activities.name: Math Club
activities.description: Participated in regional and national math competitions, achieving top 10% placements. Also tutored underclassmen in advanced mathematics.

coursework.name: AP Calculus BC
coursework.description: Covered advanced topics in calculus, including sequences, series, and multivariable calculus.

coursework.name: AP Physics C: Mechanics
coursework.description: Explored principles of mechanics, work, energy, and power, with an emphasis on problem-solving and laboratory work.

projects.name: Renewable Energy Science Fair Project
projects.description: Designed and constructed a small-scale wind turbine to explore efficient energy production, which won 2nd place at the state science fair.

projects.name: Mobile App for Community Service
projects.description: Developed a mobile application that connects volunteers with local non-profit organizations, facilitating over 1,000 hours of community service.

info.careerGoal: To become an innovative mechanical engineer focused on developing sustainable energy solutions.
info.uniqueExperiences: Participated in a summer internship with a local engineering firm, contributing to the design of an eco-friendly irrigation system.
info.uniqueExternalAttributes: Recipient of the Community Leadership Award for outstanding service and commitment to local environmental initiatives.
info.uniqueInternalAttributes: Strong problem-solving skills, creativity in approaching complex challenges, and a passion for sustainability and engineering.
